raw_title: How to fight the data grab
title_en: How to fight the data grab
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了在数字时代如何保护个人数据不被大型科技公司或政府过度收集和利用。它可能提出了应对数据掠夺的策略和方法，帮助人们维护自己的数字权利和隐私。
plain_summary_en: This article explores how to protect personal data from excessive collection and exploitation by large tech companies or governments in the digital age. It likely presents strategies and methods to combat data grabbing, helping people safeguard their digital rights and privacy.
research_direction_zh: 传播学中的数字权利与数据治理研究，关注个人在数字环境中的自主权保护机制。
research_direction_en: Research on digital rights and data governance in communication studies, focusing on mechanisms to protect individual autonomy in digital environments.
